info.title: Cardre v2 API
info.description: Auditable open-source credit scorecard builder — v2.

get.description: List all registered projects from the registry.

post.description: Create a new project by bootstrapping a fresh store at body.path.

get.description: Get a single project by ID, resolved via the registry.

schema.title: Response Get Plan Version Steps Projects  Project Id  Plan Versions  Version Id  Steps Get
Response Get Run Steps Projects  Project Id  Runs  Run Id  Steps Get
Response Get Run Evidence Projects  Project Id  Runs  Run Id  Evidence Get
Response List Manual Binning Reviews Projects  Project Id  Governance Manual Binning Reviews Get

RunEvidenceEdgeResponse.title: RunEvidenceEdgeResponse
RunEvidenceEdgeResponse.description:
Typed response for a single evidence edge in a run (#216).

Includes full provenance fields from EvidenceEdgeResponse plus
nested artifacts so the generated schema and frontend types match
the actual payload shape.

UnavailableProjectResponse.title: UnavailableProjectResponse
UnavailableProjectResponse.description: A registered project that could not be opened (corrupt, missing, etc).
